entries.title: Java Spring Boot
entries.description: Primary framework for building and maintaining over 450 production-grade microservices. Provides strong ecosystem support, security, observability, and long-term stability.

entries.title: Microservices Architecture
entries.description: Service-oriented architecture enabling independent deployment, scalability, and team autonomy across hundreds of services.

entries.title: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
entries.description: Core container orchestration platform used for deploying and scaling all microservices workloads in Azure.

entries.title: Azure Key Vault
entries.description: Centralized secrets, keys, and certificate management solution integrated with applications and CI/CD pipelines.

entries.title: Azure Blob Storage
entries.description: Used for storing unstructured data such as documents, logs, and application artifacts with high durability and availability.

entries.title: Azure PostgreSQL Flexible Server
entries.description: Managed PostgreSQL database service used for transactional workloads requiring open-source compatibility and scalability.

entries.title: Azure SQL Server
entries.description: Relational database platform supporting enterprise workloads with high availability, security, and performance.

entries.title: Oracle Database
entries.description: Legacy enterprise database still in use for critical systems. No new development is recommended unless required by existing constraints.

entries.title: Azure API Management (APIM)
entries.description: API gateway and management layer providing security, throttling, monitoring, and developer onboarding capabilities.

entries.title: TIBCO Integration Suite
entries.description: Middleware and integration platform primarily used for legacy integrations. Gradual modernization is recommended.

entries.title: Containerization (Docker)
entries.description: Standard packaging approach for all services to ensure consistency across development, testing, and production environments.

entries.title: Cloud-Native Design
entries.description: Design principles focused on scalability, resilience, and observability, leveraging managed cloud services and Kubernetes.
